intro: Calathea cannoides, also known as the Calathea or Pineland Calathea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and protect against cell damage.
